name: pod-monitor
description: PreToolUse(Bash) advisory hook that fires when a Bash command contains a GPU pod launch (`hexa cloud nohup` / `hexa cloud run`). Emits non-blocking additionalContext reminding the agent of commons @D g57 — 🛰️ Monitor tool attached to the streaming log AND `SAVE_POD=1` envar set AND ⏱ walltime estimated upfront with pod-hours headroom. Closes the R8a-LOST class (pod terminated mid-run before result.json reached the operator) by enforcing the 3 invariants at fire time. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_pod_monitor.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Sister of cloud-guard (which blocks raw runpodctl/vastai); pod-monitor advises on the wrapped `hexa cloud` path.
